title: Companion — The Prop Register
medium: six ComfyUI photograph plates (RealVisXL V5.0) of the category R. named in his letter: the prop that accompanies a signal into a medium it cannot travel through unassisted. the lunar flag's rod, the night-lit cornice, the showroom dashboard in demo mode, the foley footstep, the demo-mode TV panel, the painted cannon port.
caption: R. did not invent the rod. He was the first to install one on live television.
